name: calendar-watch-offboarder
description: Calendar_Watch_Offboarder — scheduling sub-phase B Task B6. Direct-invoke teardown of Google Calendar push channels when a coordinator is no longer bookable (scheduling_tags cleared or Workspace account suspended): resolves the coordinator's channel row(s) (or one channel by id), channels.stop the Google watch, and deletes the DDB row guarded by tenant ownership. Per-tenant OAuth scope (G2), no OAuth process cache (G5), never reads/stores the channel token (G6). Idempotent / at-least-once safe.

scripts.package: npm run build && zip -j deployment.zip dist/index.js
